author: Ismail Haddou
name: QK-Gain 5.5 + 4-Loop Recurrence + Early Parallel Residuals + Selective TTT
hardware: 1xH100 80GB HBM3 (ablation run, 2000 steps). Full submission targets 8xH100 within 600s via MAX_WALLCLOCK_SECONDS=580.
technique_summary: QK-Gain 5.5 + NUM_LOOPS=3 (4 recurrence passes, 19 virtual layers) + Early Parallel Residuals (layer 5+) + Selective TTT on loop layers + smaller TTT chunk (24576) + more TTT epochs (4) on the SP1024+GPTQ+Brotli stack
notes: Pre-quantization bpb=1.17158907 confirmed on 1xH100 ablation (2000 steps, 34.5m). On 8xH100 same wallclock ~4-5m training, total <10m. MAX_WALLCLOCK_SECONDS=580 added for 10-min compliance. Brotli install fixed for Python 3.12. Awaiting compute credits for 3-seed 8xH100 run.
